sheet_name: แปลนหลังคา
view_title: แปลนหลังคา
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า06.png
grid_source: mk_test/t4/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json

element.grid_ref: covers grid1-3 x gridA-D plus overhangs
element.description: หลังคาเหล็กรีดลอน (corrugated metal sheet roofing) shown hatched over the whole plan; two 'SLOPE 6°' labels printed vertically on the two roof faces indicating fall direction/pitch (approx. 6 degrees).

warnings: PATTERN RECLASSIFIED (t4, 2026-07-08 taxonomy): t3 classified this view as generic 'plan'. Under the new taxonomy this is now the dedicated pattern 'roof_plan' (#12) since it's a roof-framing plan with eave/overhang elements rather than room/grid_ref elements. Added two roof_plan-specific fields (ridge_or_valley_lines, eave_overhang_m) per the draft schema note that field-set for this pattern is still tentative/untested — flagged accordingly.
This is the roof-plan half of sheet A-04; the floor-plan half (pattern 'plan', unchanged) is in sibling file _หน้า06_floor_plan.json.

The 'SLOPE 6°' labels are printed clearly as 'SLOPE 6*' twice on the two roof faces — read with medium-high confidence. Cross-reference: this 6° reading should be treated as the authoritative roof-pitch figure over the small stylized slope-angle triangles seen on หน้า07/หน้า08 elevations (one of which was read as approx. '9' there, likely a misread of a similar-looking '6' at very small scale — see หน้า07_elevation2.json warning).

Actual roof framing (purlins, rafters/trusses) is not detailed on this sheet — it references 'โครงหลังคา ดูแบบวิศวกรรมโครงสร้าง' consistent with the S-01~S-08 sheets (pages 16-23), outside this extraction's page range. No ridge/valley lines are separately drawn since this is a simple single-slope (monopitch) roof, not a hip/gable roof — hence ridge_or_valley_lines is null rather than an empty array.

Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t3's หน้า06_roof_plan.json — same overhang dimensions and slope reading, no disagreement found; field-set for the 'roof_plan' pattern label is new in t4 (first real test of it) though the underlying content is unchanged from t3.
